approval_basis: User delegated approval of the recommended implementation rules.

fixed_heldout_audit_query_set.eligibility: canonical query_id is runnable for both representative baseline adapters at every locked snapshot; eligibility is computed before outcomes or rewards are read
fixed_heldout_audit_query_set.selection: within each stream, order eligible query_ids by SHA-256 of selector_seed, stream_id, and query_id; select the first n_audit
fixed_heldout_audit_query_set.n_audit: for N>=2, min(N-1,max(1,floor(0.30*N+0.5))); N<2 is a hard data-integrity failure
fixed_heldout_audit_query_set.reuse: the selected query_id set is frozen once and reused at snapshots 100,200,300,400,500 and for both baseline classes
fixed_heldout_audit_query_set.inclusion_probability: n_audit/N within stream; every stream-by-snapshot audit record stores pi and design weight 1/pi
fixed_heldout_audit_query_set.manifest: record universe and selected sample-index SHA-256, selector seed, stream, query_id, snapshot grid, pi, and zero-overlap proof against TRAIN and confirmatory roles

train_priority_score_contract.branch_draw: seeded categorical draw with probabilities uniform=0.20, uncertainty=0.40, utility_usage=0.40
train_priority_score_contract.uncertainty_raw: sample standard deviation of predictions from five deterministic task-bootstrap refits of the current ACA architecture
train_priority_score_contract.unfitted_uncertainty_behavior: fall back to uniform sampling and record the fallback; do not use AUDIT observations
train_priority_score_contract.utility_usage_raw: 0.5 times within-pool percentile rank of current utility plus 0.5 times within-pool percentile rank of log1p(retrieval_count)
train_priority_score_contract.normalization: midrank empirical percentile in the eligible TRAIN pool; non-finite values are ineligible; all-equal scores become uniform
train_priority_score_contract.sampling: probability proportional to normalized score plus 1/N, without replacement, until exactly m=2 memories are selected
train_priority_score_contract.tie_breaking: ascending SHA-256 of atomic run seed and memory_id

neutral_pad_token_length_matching.tokenizer_binding: use the exact tokenizer revision recorded by the run model manifest with add_special_tokens=false
neutral_pad_token_length_matching.algorithm: encode [EMPTY_MEMORY_SLOT] once; if target length is at least the marker length, repeat marker token IDs cyclically and slice to the exact target length; pass token IDs directly without decode/re-encode
neutral_pad_token_length_matching.short_target_behavior: mark NEUTRAL_PAD_UNREPRESENTABLE, do not run that pair, fail/not-run the equivalence validation, and apply the approved pad-replacement wording downgrade
neutral_pad_token_length_matching.provenance: record tokenizer revision, marker token IDs SHA-256, removed length, produced length, and algorithm revision

paired_bundle_budget_ceiling.atomic_unit: one shared-control plus all paired LOO conditions for the selected memories and their aligned rollout seeds
paired_bundle_budget_ceiling.admission: before starting, compute worst-case rollout-equivalent and token reservation; start only if both remaining hard ceilings cover the full reservation
paired_bundle_budget_ceiling.ceiling_behavior: do not start or partially execute the bundle; record BLOCKED_BUDGET_CEILING with RESOURCE failure type
paired_bundle_budget_ceiling.accounting: replace reservations with realized costs after bundle completion; unused reservation is released; neither ceiling may be exceeded

sr_slope_clustered_interval.point_estimator: ordinary least-squares slope of design-weighted SR@20% on numeric snapshot task index t in 100,200,300,400,500
sr_slope_clustered_interval.ccc: Spearman rank correlation with midranks at memory level
sr_slope_clustered_interval.resampling: 10,000 deterministic task-clustered paired BCa bootstrap replicates; resample task IDs once per replicate and preserve all snapshots, systems, controls, and LOO pairs for that task
sr_slope_clustered_interval.bootstrap_seed: SHA-256-derived integer from atomic run family, baseline_id, metric_id, and locked analysis revision
sr_slope_clustered_interval.multiplicity: within each baseline separately, apply Holm step-down one-sided family-wise alpha=0.05 to the two G-C1 hypotheses: slope greater than 0 and CCC less than 0.5
sr_slope_clustered_interval.invalid_behavior: missing snapshots, fewer than two task clusters, constant ranks, non-finite estimates, or degenerate resamples make the affected gate fail rather than pass

shared_control_and_deployment_reuse.shared_control_rollout_count: K_ctrl equals the condition rollout count K; therefore K_ctrl=5 in the pilot
shared_control_and_deployment_reuse.pairing: control and every LOO condition use the same ordered rollout seeds
shared_control_and_deployment_reuse.deployment_reuse: reuse at most one deployment rollout as control seed index 0 only when query_id, task state, bank snapshot SHA-256, retrieval set and order, model and tokenizer revisions, decoding configuration, reward evaluator revision, and rollout seed all match exactly
shared_control_and_deployment_reuse.otherwise: r_reuse=0 and all K control rollouts are generated
shared_control_and_deployment_reuse.provenance: record source run ID and output SHA-256 for reuse; count a reused rollout once in realized cost and never duplicate it across bundles
